description_long: This is a small, cylindrical water tower with a conical roof, supported by four slender metal legs. The main body of the tower is metallic and weathered, showing signs of rust and age, with a slightly domed bottom. The structure is utilitarian, with minimal ornamentation, and the words 'WATER TOWER' are faintly visible on one side. The legs are thin and evenly spaced, providing stability while elevating the tank above ground level. The overall appearance is industrial, typical of older urban or rural water towers, and the surface is predominantly gray with some brownish rust streaks.
description: A small, weathered metal water tower with a conical roof, supported by four thin legs and marked with 'WATER TOWER' on one side. The structure is utilitarian and industrial, showing signs of rust.
description_view_0: Front view showing the conical roof, cylindrical tank, and four supporting legs; no visible text.
description_view_1: Side view with 'WATER TOWER' text visible on the tank and clear view of the supporting legs.
description_view_2: Rear view with the tank and legs visible, no text or additional features apparent.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, with the conical roof and legs visible, no text.
